subcodes.title: Christ and Baha’u’llah
subcodes.first_line: Some have asserted that, while mighty signs and marvellous deeds have appeared from Baha'u'llah, through which His greatness shines forth as resplendent as the sun
subcodes.first_line_orig: بعضی از اشخاص ذکر نموده‌اند که هرچند آثار عظیمه از جمال مبارک ظاهر شده و اعمال غریبه صادر گشته
subcodes.subjects: @Christ; Christianity, @station of the Manifestation of God, @martyrs and martyrdom, @growth of the Cause
